title: Resistance calculation and analysis of underwater vehicle-manipulator systems
author_string: Zhu, Yazhou, Wang, Zhenyu, Sun, Rui, Yang, Kun, Qiao, Yilin
abstract:
Abstract
               This article takes the underwater vehicle-manipulator systems (UVMS) composed of an autonomous underwater vehicle and a mechanical arm as the research object. STAR CCM+ software is used to perform hydrodynamic simulation on it. Its suitable navigation postures are verified. The resistance of UVMS is calculated and velocity cloud maps are generated. A comparison was made between the resistance experienced by the UVMS system during direct navigation and simulated operations, verifying that the resistance is related to the velocity and attitude of the UVMS, and proving that this study has important reference significance for the study of the hydrodynamic performance of the UVMS.
